series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Veterans Children's Home (OVCH) Medical Records
series_metadata.series_description: Medical records pertaining to the children residing at the Ohio Veterans Children's Home, previously known as the Ohio Soldiers’ and Sailors’ Orphans Home.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper files for 50 years after the date of birth for the child residing at the home. Some files were digitized; yet the originals are still in paper format. For the electronic format, retain for 50 years after the date of birth for the child residing at the home. ; Electronic: Retain paper files for 50 years after the date of birth for the child residing at the home. Some files were digitized; yet the originals are still in paper format.For the electronic format, retain for 50 years after the date of birth for the child residing at the home., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
